The recession caused many job losses.
Fiscal policy controls government spending.
The country has a large trade deficit.
GDP measures the size of an economy.
Monetary policy controls interest rates.
Austerity measures reduced public services.
Microeconomics studies individual markets.
Prices are determined by supply and demand.
The central bank raised the interest rate.
Farm subsidies help farmers stay afloat.
Tariffs on imports protect local industries.
Free trade agreements reduce tariffs.

Kinh tế.vi: chủ nghĩa bảo hộ mậu dịch
Kinh tế.ex: Protectionism shields local businesses.
The stock market fell sharply yesterday.
Government bonds are low-risk investments.
The central bank controls the money supply.
A weak exchange rate boosts exports.
The government ran a budget deficit.
The country has a trade surplus.
GDP per capita measures individual wealth.
Currency devaluation can boost exports.
Globalization connects economies worldwide.
Oil is a valuable commodity.
The bond yield has increased.
Privatization of state companies was controversial.
The government nationalized the oil industry.
Vietnam has seen strong economic growth.
The unemployment rate fell to 3%.
Inflation erodes purchasing power.

Luật pháp.ex: This court has jurisdiction over the case.
He hired an attorney for his case.

Luật pháp.vi: bản tuyên thệ / lời khai có tuyên thệ

Luật pháp.ex: This ruling sets a legal precedent.
She received a subpoena to testify.

Luật pháp.vi: lời khai trước tòa (ngoài phiên xử)

Luật pháp.ex: He received a conviction for theft.
The statute was amended last year.

Luật pháp.vi: thủ tục tố tụng hợp lệ

Luật pháp.ex: The burden of proof lies with the prosecution.
They filed a class action lawsuit.

Luật pháp.vi: giải quyết ngoài tòa / dàn xếp
lệnh đưa người ra trước tòa
Luật pháp.ex: He filed a writ of habeas corpus.
The grand jury issued an indictment.
The witness was subjected to cross-examination.

Luật pháp.vi: cố vấn pháp lý / luật sư tư vấn

Luật pháp.ex: The dispute was resolved through mediation.

Luật pháp.vi: vi phạm dân sự / hành vi bất hợp pháp gây thiệt hại

Luật pháp.ex: The company protects its intellectual property.

Luật pháp.vi: tiền tại ngoại / bảo lãnh ra tù

Luật pháp.ex: The case is barred by the statute of limitations.

Y khoa.ex: The diagnosis was confirmed by blood tests.
She has a chronic back condition.
A pathology report confirmed the cancer.
Epidemiology tracks the spread of disease.
She was put under general anesthesia.
Inflammation is a sign of infection.
Take the full course of antibiotics.
The COVID-19 vaccine was developed quickly.
A healthy diet supports the immune system.
Hypertension increases the risk of stroke.
She had an MRI to check for injuries.
Physical rehabilitation helped him walk again.
Prescription drugs require a doctor's order.
Telemedicine became popular during the pandemic.

Triết học.ex: Epistemology asks: what can we know?
Ontology deals with the nature of being.
Hegel's dialectic involves thesis, antithesis, synthesis.
Pragmatism values practical results over theory.
Metaphysics explores reality beyond the physical.
Determinism argues all events are pre-determined.
Relativism holds that truth is subjective.
Solipsism holds that only one's own mind exists.

Triết học.vi: ngụy biện / lập luận sai lầm
Triết học.ex: That argument contains a logical fallacy.

Triết học.vi: thông diễn học / khoa học giải thích
chủ nghĩa duy vật biện chứng

Triết học.ex: Rousseau wrote about the social contract.
Kant's categorical imperative guides moral action.
What is the nature of consciousness?
Camus explored absurdism in his works.
Logic is the foundation of mathematics.

Truyền thông.vi: bài xã luận / ban biên tập
phát sóng / chương trình phát sóng
tiêu đề báo / tin tức chính

Truyền thông.ex: She is a war correspondent in Ukraine.
The minister held a press conference.
She hosts a popular podcast about history.
The newspaper has a large circulation.

Truyền thông.vi: dòng tên tác giả bài báo
Truyền thông.ex: The byline showed the reporter's name.
She got the scoop on the scandal.

Truyền thông.vi: bài bình luận / quan điểm của tác giả
Truyền thông.ex: He wrote an op-ed about climate change.
Freedom of the press is essential in democracy.
Readers should be aware of media bias.

Truyền thông.vi: tiêu đề câu view / nội dung giật gân
tin tức nóng hổi / vừa mới xảy ra
Truyền thông.ex: Breaking news: a major earthquake hit.
Several media outlets covered the story.

Truyền thông.vi: chỉ số tự do báo chí
Truyền thông.ex: The country ranked low on the press freedom index.

Truyền thông.vi: phóng viên săn ảnh người nổi tiếng
thông tin giả mạo cố ý

Truyền thông.ex: The show uses satire to criticize politics.

Truyền thông.vi: thuật toán (quyết định nội dung bạn thấy)
Truyền thông.ex: Social media algorithms control what you see.

Truyền thông.vi: buồng vọng (nơi chỉ nghe ý kiến giống mình)

IELTS/TOEFL.ex: The paradox of choice leads to unhappiness.
Trees mitigate the effects of climate change.

IELTS/TOEFL.vi: sinh sôi nảy nở / lan tràn nhanh

IELTS/TOEFL.ex: A pragmatic approach solves problems faster.
Her essay was coherent and well-structured.

IELTS/TOEFL.vi: chứng minh / làm rõ bằng bằng chứng

IELTS/TOEFL.ex: There is a dichotomy between work and leisure.

IELTS/TOEFL.vi: đặt cạnh nhau để so sánh
IELTS/TOEFL.ex: The essay juxtaposes two opposing views.

IELTS/TOEFL.vi: diễn đạt rõ ràng / lưu loát

IELTS/TOEFL.ex: He conceded that he was wrong.

IELTS/TOEFL.vi: sắc thái / khía cạnh tinh tế
hệ quả / nhánh vấn đề phức tạp

IELTS/TOEFL.ex: We can extrapolate from this data.

IELTS/TOEFL.vi: hàm ý / ý nghĩa gián tiếp
IELTS/TOEFL.ex: Consider the implications of your decision.

IELTS/TOEFL.vi: xác nhận / làm củng cố thêm
hùng hồn / diễn đạt trôi chảy

IELTS/TOEFL.ex: Corruption is pervasive in some regions.
There is an implicit assumption in the argument.
Please be explicit about your requirements.

Văn học.ex: 'Life is a journey' is a metaphor.
The story is filled with irony.
Harry Potter is the protagonist.
The narrative was gripping.

Văn học.vi: truyện ngụ ngôn / ẩn dụ kéo dài
Văn học.ex: Animal Farm is an allegory of communism.
Hamlet's soliloquy is world-famous.

Văn học.vi: kết cục / phần giải quyết mâu thuẫn
Văn học.ex: The denouement was unexpected.
She is the epitome of grace.
'As brave as a lion' is a simile.
'Peter Piper picked' uses alliteration.
Buzz and splash are onomatopoeia.
The dark clouds foreshadow the tragedy.
The novel uses flashbacks effectively.
The antagonist seeks to destroy the hero.
The main theme is love and sacrifice.

Văn học.vi: chủ nghĩa biểu tượng / dùng biểu tượng
Văn học.ex: The green light in Gatsby symbolizes hope.
Mystery is a popular literary genre.
He writes in elegant prose.
The verse has a perfect rhyme.

Văn học.vi: cách dùng từ / phong cách ngôn từ
Văn học.ex: The author's diction is precise.
The plot twist shocked everyone.

Văn học.vi: sự thanh lọc cảm xúc (qua nghệ thuật)
Văn học.ex: Tragedy provides catharsis for the audience.

Văn học.vi: dòng ý thức (kỹ thuật văn học)
Văn học.ex: Virginia Woolf used stream of consciousness.

Văn học.vi: người kể chuyện không đáng tin
Văn học.ex: Gone Girl features an unreliable narrator.

Văn học.vi: khoảnh khắc giác ngộ / nhận ra sự thật
Văn học.ex: The character has an epiphany in the final chapter.
Swift's works are famous for satire.

Văn học.vi: bài thơ / bài văn ai điếu
Văn học.ex: He wrote an elegy for his friend.
Jane Eyre is a classic bildungsroman.
Water is a recurring motif in the novel.

Văn học.vi: kết thúc dàn xếp gượng ép bất ngờ
Văn học.ex: The rescue felt like a deus ex machina.

Văn học.vi: xã hội tối tăm / phản không tưởng
Văn học.ex: 1984 depicts a dystopia.

Nghiên cứu.vi: theo chiều dọc / nghiên cứu dài hạn
Nghiên cứu.ex: A longitudinal study tracks people over time.
Quantitative research uses numbers and statistics.
Qualitative research explores opinions and feelings.
There is a correlation between poverty and crime.
The researchers controlled for several variables.

Nghiên cứu.vi: tam giác hóa (dùng nhiều phương pháp)
Nghiên cứu.ex: Triangulation improves research reliability.

Nghiên cứu.vi: ngoại suy / suy rộng ra từ dữ liệu
Nghiên cứu.ex: We cannot extrapolate from such a small sample.

Nghiên cứu.vi: suy luận / kết luận từ dữ liệu
Nghiên cứu.ex: The inference was supported by the data.
A larger sample size gives more reliable results.
Confirmation bias affects research findings.
Age can be a confounding variable.
Random sampling reduces selection bias.

Nghiên cứu.vi: tái hiện / lặp lại thí nghiệm
Nghiên cứu.ex: Replication is key to scientific validity.
The study lacked validity.
Reliability means consistent results.
The null hypothesis was rejected.
The results were significant at p < 0.05.
Data collection took six months.

Nghiên cứu.vi: dân tộc học / nghiên cứu mô tả văn hóa
Nghiên cứu.ex: Ethnography involves observing communities.

Nghiên cứu.vi: lý thuyết nền tảng (từ dữ liệu)
Nghiên cứu.ex: Grounded theory builds theory from data.
A meta-analysis combined results from 50 studies.

Nghiên cứu.vi: cắt ngang / nghiên cứu tại một thời điểm
Nghiên cứu.ex: A cross-sectional study collects data at one time.
The literature review summarizes past research.
The study addresses a clear research gap.

Nghiên cứu.vi: phương pháp hỗn hợp (định lượng + định tính)
Nghiên cứu.ex: Mixed methods combine surveys and interviews.

Nghiên cứu.vi: làm rõ nghĩa thực tiễn / cụ thể hóa khái niệm
Nghiên cứu.ex: Define and operationalize your variables.
The conceptual framework guides the study.

Nghiên cứu.vi: phê duyệt đạo đức nghiên cứu
Nghiên cứu.ex: You need ethical clearance before testing on humans.

Nghiên cứu.vi: sự đồng ý có đầy đủ thông tin
Nghiên cứu.ex: All participants gave informed consent.

Nghiên cứu.vi: bảng câu hỏi / công cụ khảo sát
Nghiên cứu.ex: The survey instrument was tested on a pilot group.
Only cite peer-reviewed research.

Ngoại giao.ex: The multilateral agreement was signed by 30 nations.
The two countries signed a bilateral trade deal.
Economic sanctions were imposed.
The arms embargo was extended.
The senate ratified the climate agreement.

Ngoại giao.vi: hòa dịu quan hệ ngoại giao
Ngoại giao.ex: Détente reduced tensions during the Cold War.

Ngoại giao.vi: ngoài lãnh thổ / có quyền tài phán ngoài biên giới
Ngoại giao.ex: Embassies have extraterritorial status.
The summit ended with a joint communiqué.
The envoy was sent to negotiate peace.
The ambassador met with the foreign minister.
Apply for a visa at the consulate.

Ngoại giao.vi: hiệp ước / điều ước quốc tế
Ngoại giao.ex: The peace treaty ended the war.
The annexation was condemned internationally.
Both sides agreed to a ceasefire.
The UN respects sovereignty of all nations.
The principle of non-intervention is key in diplomacy.
The conflict became a proxy war.
Diplomats enjoy diplomatic immunity.
The country requested extradition.
Russia maintained its sphere of influence.
The G20 summit addressed global issues.

Ngoại giao.vi: Hội đồng Bảo an Liên Hợp Quốc
Ngoại giao.ex: The UN Security Council voted on the resolution.
UN peacekeeping forces were deployed.
The Cold War shaped modern geopolitics.
The normalization of relations was historic.
The Eastern Bloc collapsed in 1991.
Culture is a form of soft power.

Ngoại giao.vi: quyền lực cứng (quân sự, kinh tế)
Ngoại giao.ex: Military force is an example of hard power.
The region has great geopolitical importance.
Asylum seekers must prove fear of persecution.
Foreign policy is shaped by national interests.

Tài chính.ex: Derivatives are complex financial instruments.
Hedge funds are high-risk investments.
Cash has the highest liquidity.
The bond yield rose sharply.
Diversify your investment portfolio.
Traders use arbitrage to make profits.
The house was used as collateral.
Loan amortization spreads payments over time.

Tài chính.vi: vốn chủ sở hữu / cổ phần
Tài chính.ex: She sold her equity in the company.

Tài chính.vi: phát hành cổ phiếu lần đầu
Tài chính.ex: The company launched an IPO.
Mutual funds are suitable for beginners.
Real estate is a valuable asset.

Tài chính.vi: nợ phải trả / trách nhiệm pháp lý
Tài chính.ex: Companies must manage their liabilities.
Her net worth is over $10 million.
The company paid a dividend to shareholders.
Apple has a massive market capitalization.
Investors are cautious in a bear market.
A bull market boosts investor confidence.
High leverage increases risk.
Startups often rely on venture capital.
Our fiscal year ends in December.

Tài chính.vi: lãi vốn / lãi từ đầu tư
Tài chính.ex: She paid tax on her capital gains.
Compound interest grows savings quickly.
A poor credit rating limits borrowing.

Tài chính.vi: mất khả năng thanh toán / phá sản
Tài chính.ex: The company filed for insolvency.
Review the balance sheet quarterly.

Tài chính.vi: báo cáo lưu chuyển tiền tệ
Tài chính.ex: The cash flow statement shows real income.
Venture debt complements equity financing.
Risk management is crucial in finance.

Tài chính.vi: biện pháp thắt chặt chi tiêu
Tài chính.ex: Austerity measures cut government spending.
Quantitative easing was used to boost the economy.

Khoa học.ex: Entropy always increases in a closed system.
Quantum physics challenges our understanding of reality.
The enzyme acts as a catalyst.
Photosynthesis is a synthesis reaction.
The hypothesis was tested in the lab.
The human genome was mapped in 2003.
Nanotechnology may revolutionize medicine.
Light is an electromagnetic wave.
Thermodynamics studies heat and energy.
Neuroscience explores the brain's functions.
Photosynthesis converts sunlight into energy.
Molecular biology studies DNA and proteins.

Khoa học.vi: công nghệ chỉnh sửa gen CRISPR
Khoa học.ex: CRISPR can edit genetic material precisely.
Stem cells can develop into different cell types.
Dark matter makes up most of the universe.
Einstein's theory of relativity changed physics.
Quantum entanglement links particles instantly.
Superconductors have zero electrical resistance.
Darwin's theory of evolution is widely accepted.

Khoa học.vi: phân hủy sinh học / có thể phân hủy
Khoa học.ex: Use biodegradable packaging.

Khoa học.vi: vật lý hạt nhân / hạt cơ bản
Khoa học.ex: Particle physics studies the smallest components of matter.
Astrophysics studies stars and galaxies.
Osmosis allows water to pass through membranes.
Carbon-14 is a radioactive isotope.
Different colors have different wavelengths.
Gene expression determines how traits appear.
Rust is caused by oxidation.
The centrifuge separates blood components.
Radioactivity can be harmful in large doses.
A photon is a particle of light.
Forests provide essential ecosystem services.
